description: This is a child table of Program Enrollment. Rows may represent internal course offerings (populated via Course Schedule) or transferred/legacy grades from a Partner Seminary.

fields.description: Course Schedule for an internal course offering the student attended. Leave blank for transferred/legacy rows.
fields.label: Course

fields.description: Fields populated only when this row represents a transferred or legacy grade from a Partner Seminary. See ADRs 005 & 006.
fields.label: Transfer / Legacy

fields.description: Presence of this field flags the row as transferred/legacy rather than an internal course offering.
fields.label: Partner Seminary

fields.description: The submitted equivalence record that authorized this mapping.
fields.label: Course Equivalence

fields.description: Submitted conversion policy applied at grade-entry time (stable via Frappe's amendment pattern).
fields.label: Conversion Policy Applied

fields.description: Course code as recorded by the partner. Part of the idempotency key for re-importable batches.
fields.label: Source Course Code

fields.description: Partner's term label (free text; partner terms are not tracked as Academic Term records).
fields.label: Source Term

fields.description: Original grade as recorded by the partner, pre-conversion.
fields.label: Source Grade

fields.description: Source-system ID when available; takes precedence over the natural key for idempotency.
fields.label: External Reference

fields.description: Warning raised during conversion (per ADR 006 rounding/out-of-range rules).
fields.label: Conversion Warning

fields.description: Reason captured when a registrar overrode a minimum-transferable-grade block.
fields.label: Conversion Override Note

name: Program Enrollment Course
